ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the project was ordered */,
  "execution_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project execution */,
  "execution_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project execution */,
  "cost" REAL /* Total cost of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Pending, Completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the project entry was created */,
  "project_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project category */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated completion date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the project is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project related to the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., Send Email, Print PDF) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  "is_automated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the action is automated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_actions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Project Manager, Team Member) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_users" (
  "project_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the project-user association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is the primary contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_users_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_status_history" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the status entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project whose status is being tracked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who changed the status */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_status_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_status_history_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the comment is related */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was created */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is private */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is important */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the cost */,
  "cost_type" TEXT /* Type of cost incurred (e.g., labor, materials) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the cost incurred */,
  "date_incurred" TEXT /* Date when the cost was incurred */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number associated with the cost */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cost has been paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_costs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
